Compliance.description: Fully licensed SA fleet; Part of Avis Budget Group; CPA/NCA compliant; no 2025/2026 violations/fines found; T&Cs comprehensive.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.97/5 (57 reviews, low NPS -56); TripAdvisor mixed; app 3.5/5. Complaints on hidden charges/car quality; positives on staff/service in some branches.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing especially online; good fleet variety; Avis Preferred loyalty savings; various specials/packages.

Innovation.description: Mobile app booking/fleet management; online reservations; Preferred loyalty; digital receipts; fleet tech integration.

Customer Support.description: Phone (0861 02 01 19), app, online. Reviews mixed: efficient for standard but poor at disputes/billing.

Accessibility & Security.description: App available; national reach; no specific POPIA violations. Standard car rental data practices; website accessible.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From ~R350/day economy; varies by duration/class; online discounts available

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed: HelloPeter complaints on charges/service; some positive branch experiences; app mixed.
